# Sage Nord

> Sage Nord (legal entity: Saga ApS) is a software and AI company based
> in Denmark. It builds its own AI products, and helps other teams build
> theirs.

Mission: Software worth trusting.
Defining value: Trust. Software reliable enough that people can depend on it.

## About
- Builds its own AI products for consumers and businesses.
- Also builds AI and software products for other companies, from early-stage
  work to enterprise and public-sector tenders.
- You work directly with the people doing the engineering, with no layers
  and no handoffs.
- Based in Denmark; serves the Nordics and Europe.

## Contact
- Email: hello@sagenord.com
- Website: https://sorunokoe.github.io/SageNord/ (moving to https://sagenord.com)
